creator: ade@lovett.com
text:
Another distfile survey cleanup.  Distfiles for games/spider
	were unfetchable from the one and only master site.

	I've managed to find a copy of the distfile, and made it
	available on my co-located box -- an additional home for it
	wouldn't hurt, though.

Fix: Apply following patch, adding any further master sites.
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd games/spider; make fetch
